holdings.infoBox: VXUS is an equity ETF with a total of 8807 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 3.98%, Samsung Electronics at 2.19%, SK hynix at 1.86%, Slcmt1142 at 1.84%, and ASML Holding at 1.39%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Total International Stock ETF (VXUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Global All Cap x US index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of stocks covering 99% of the global market capitalization outside the US. VXUS was launched on Jan 26, 2011 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE Global All Cap x US
